query:
INSERT INTO questions (questionId, sectionId, sectionTitle, questionNumber, shortTitle, questionText, questionType, required) VALUES 
('orders-workflow_config', 'orders-workflow', 'Orders Workflow', 1, 'Orders-Workflow-Config', 'Orders Workflow Configuration', 'workflow', 0),
('images-workflow_config', 'images-workflow', 'Images Workflow (DICOM)', 1, 'Images-Workflow-Config', 'Images Workflow Configuration', 'workflow', 0),
('priors-workflow_config', 'priors-workflow', 'Priors Workflow', 1, 'Priors-Workflow-Config', 'Priors Workflow Configuration', 'workflow', 0),
('reports-workflow_config', 'reports-workflow', 'Reports Out Workflow', 1, 'Reports-Workflow-Config', 'Reports Out Workflow Configuration', 'workflow', 0)
ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE questionText=VALUES(questionText);
